bundles.name: Expense Tracker
bundles.description: Track daily expenses with category breakdowns and a visual chart. Uses the Papr DB API for persistent local storage.
bundles.author: paprwork-team
bundles.icon: <svg width="36" height="36" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none"><line x1="12" y1="1" x2="12" y2="23" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round"/><path d="M17 5H9.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 0 0 7h5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 0 7H6" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg>

bundles.name: Hello World
bundles.description: Minimal starter template for building Paprwork mini-apps. Demonstrates HTML structure, styling, and the Papr DB API.
bundles.author: paprwork-team
bundles.icon: <svg width="36" height="36" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none"><path d="M12 2L2 7l10 5 10-5-10-5z" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/><path d="M2 17l10 5 10-5" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/><path d="M2 12l10 5 10-5" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg>

bundles.name: Meetings Manager
bundles.description: AI-powered meeting manager — calendar sync, recording, transcription, summarization, prep docs, and memory sync
bundles.author: amirkabbara
bundles.icon:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 512 512" fill="none">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0" y1="0" x2="512" y2="512" gradientUnits="userSpaceOnUse">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#1e1b4b"/>
      <stop offset="45%" stop-color="#3730a3"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#6d28d9"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="shine" x1="0" y1="0" x2="200" y2="200" gradientUnits="userSpaceOnUse">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#ffffff" stop-opacity="0.18"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#ffffff" stop-opacity="0"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="card" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="300" gradientUnits="userSpaceOnUse">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#ffffff" stop-opacity="0.97"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#e0e7ff" stop-opacity="0.92"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <filter id="glow" x="-40%" y="-40%" width="180%" height="180%">
      <feGaussianBlur in="SourceGraphic" stdDeviation="7" result="blur"/>
      <feMerge><feMergeNode in="blur"/><feMergeNode in="SourceGraphic"/></feMerge>
    </filter>
    <filter id="shadow" x="-12%" y="-8%" width="124%" height="128%">
      <feDropShadow dx="0" dy="8" stdDeviation="14" flood-color="#1e1b4b" flood-opacity="0.4"/>
    </filter>
  </defs>

  <!-- Background -->
  <rect width="512" height="512" rx="114" fill="url(#bg)"/>
  <!-- Gloss -->
  <ellipse cx="180" cy="140" rx="210" ry="125" fill="url(#shine)"/>

  <!-- Calendar card -->
  <g filter="url(#shadow)">
    <rect x="96" y="144" width="276" height="236" rx="28" fill="url(#card)"/>
  </g>

  <!-- Calendar header -->
  <rect x="96" y="144" width="276" height="62" rx="28" fill="#4338ca"/>
  <rect x="96" y="174" width="276" height="32" fill="#4338ca"/>

  <!-- Ring clips -->
  <rect x="164" y="116" width="18" height="54" rx="9" fill="#a5b4fc"/>
  <rect x="286" y="116" width="18" height="54" rx="9" fill="#a5b4fc"/>

  <!-- Weekday dots in header -->
  <circle cx="152" cy="176" r="5" fill="#818cf8" opacity="0.65"/>
  <circle cx="196" cy="176" r="5" fill="#818cf8" opacity="0.65"/>
  <circle cx="240" cy="176" r="5" fill="#818cf8" opacity="0.65"/>
  <circle cx="284" cy="176" r="5" fill="#818cf8" opacity="0.65"/>
  <circle cx="328" cy="176" r="5" fill="#818cf8" opacity="0.65"/>

  <!-- Meeting block row 1 -->
  <rect x="114" y="222" width="72" height="40" rx="10" fill="#6366f1" opacity="0.13"/>
  <rect x="114" y="222" width="5" height="40" rx="3" fill="#6366f1"/>
  <rect x="126" y="230" width="44" height="7" rx="3" fill="#312e81" opacity="0.45"/>
  <rect x="126" y="242" width="30" height="5" rx="2" fill="#312e81" opacity="0.28"/>

  <rect x="198" y="222" width="72" height="40" rx="10" fill="#ddd6fe" opacity="0.45"/>

  <rect x="282" y="222" width="76" height="40" rx="10" fill="#7c3aed" opacity="0.13"/>
  <rect x="282" y="222" width="5" height="40" rx="3" fill="#7c3aed"/>
  <rect x="294" y="230" width="48" height="7" rx="3" fill="#3b0764" opacity="0.4"/>
  <rect x="294" y="242" width="34" height="5" rx="2" fill="#3b0764" opacity="0.22"/>

  <!-- Meeting block row 2 (wide) -->
  <rect x="114" y="276" width="152" height="40" rx="10" fill="#0ea5e9" opacity="0.11"/>
  <rect x="114" y="276" width="5" height="40" rx="3" fill="#0284c7"/>
  <rect x="126" y="284" width="86" height="7" rx="3" fill="#0c4a6e" opacity="0.38"/>
  <rect x="126" y="296" width="58" height="5" rx="2" fill="#0c4a6e" opacity="0.22"/>

  <rect x="278" y="276" width="80" height="40" rx="10" fill="#e0e7ff" opacity="0.5"/>
  <rect x="288" y="284" width="52" height="6" rx="3" fill="#6366f1" opacity="0.3"/>
  <rect x="288" y="296" width="38" height="5" rx="2" fill="#6366f1" opacity="0.2"/>

  <!-- Sparkle star (AI) top right -->
  <g filter="url(#glow)">
    <path d="M390 76 L397 100 L421 107 L397 114 L390 138 L383 114 L359 107 L383 100 Z" fill="#fbbf24"/>
    <path d="M424 52 L428 64 L440 68 L428 72 L424 84 L420 72 L408 68 L420 64 Z" fill="#fde68a" opacity="0.9"/>
    <circle cx="408" cy="46" r="4.5" fill="#fef9c3" opacity="0.75"/>
  </g>

  <!-- Speech bubble (notes) bottom-right -->
  <g opacity="0.93">
    <rect x="300" y="334" width="120" height="82" rx="20" fill="#7c3aed" filter="url(#shadow)"/>
    <path d="M312 416 L292 442 L330 416 Z" fill="#7c3aed"/>
    <rect x="316" y="352" width="76" height="8" rx="4" fill="#fff" opacity="0.82"/>
    <rect x="316" y="367" width="58" height="8" rx="4" fill="#fff" opacity="0.58"/>
    <rect x="316" y="382" width="42" height="8" rx="4" fill="#fff" opacity="0.36"/>
  </g>
</svg>
